commands.command: node $SNAP_LOCAL_REGISTRY -- vp create @your-org:with-build-dep --no-interactive --approve-builds --package-manager bun --directory approved-app # --approve-builds runs `bun pm trust` for the gated build script (core-js)

commands: cat approved-app/package.json # core-js recorded under trustedDependencies

commands.command: node $SNAP_LOCAL_REGISTRY -- vp create @your-org:with-build-dep --no-interactive --package-manager bun --directory default-app # default run surfaces the gated build with guidance, leaving it untrusted

commands: cat default-app/package.json # no trustedDependencies, the build was not run
cd default-app && node $SNAP_LOCAL_REGISTRY -- vp pm approve-builds core-js # the guidance's `vp pm approve-builds` command approves the gated build
cat default-app/package.json # core-js is now recorded under trustedDependencies
